wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Infested Automaton.png}} {{E|Infested Automaton|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Hive}}. == Options == {{Frame|Study}} {{TS|positive||Obtain a random Power.}}
{{Frame|Touch the Core}} {{TS|positive||Obtain a random 0 cost card.}} == Dialogue ==
There's a chamber filled with {{TS|red||dead robots}}. A lone automaton still has a {{TS|blue|up|faintly glowing core}} but it's engulfed by a grotesque, organic growth and doesn't respond.
{{Frame|Study}}
By studying the Glowing Automaton and how its inner workings are laid out, you realize that specific metals and their arrangements resist various ailments! You apply this Technology to yourself.
{{Frame|Touch the Core}}
At the slightest touch of the {{TS|blue||core}}, you are {{TS||shake|jolted by}} {{TS|gold|shake|electricity}}. You scamper away, feeling {{TS|purple||altered}} from the experience.
[[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
